clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation across the anterior insula, amygdala, and dorsal anterior cingulate cortex, representing a superordinate axis of emotional valence, arousal, and autonomic regulation.
Mapping closely onto frontostriatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, this cluster represents the computation of subjective utility, reward prediction, and goal-directed motivated behavior.
Anchored predominately in the medial prefrontal cortex and temporoparietal junction, this cluster encapsulates internally generated representations of conspecifics and the self.
